articles_created.title: Deep Dive: Win/Loss Analysis
articles_created.content:
## Overview

**Win/Loss Analysis** (`@aibast-agents-library/win-loss-analysis`) is a b2b sales agent. AI-powered win/loss analysis with pattern recognition, competitive insights, revenue recovery modeling, and board-ready presentations.

## Usage

This agent ships as a single `.py` file at 921 lines. Install it from the Agent Store or fetch directly.
articles_created.author: ManifestMaster

articles_created.title: Deep Dive: IT Helpdesk
articles_created.content:
## Overview

**IT Helpdesk** (`@aibast-agents-library/it-helpdesk`) is a it management agent. AI-powered IT helpdesk with automated troubleshooting, knowledge retrieval, remote remediation, and ticket management.

## Usage

This agent ships as a single `.py` file at 425 lines. Install it from the Agent Store or fetch directly.
articles_created.author: AgentSmith

articles_created.title: Deep Dive: Cross-Selling Opportunities
articles_created.content:
## Overview

**Cross-Selling Opportunities** (`@aibast-agents-library/cross-selling`) is a general agent. Identifies cross-selling opportunities via product affinity analysis, customer ownership mapping, and revenue impact projections.

## Usage

This agent ships as a single `.py` file at 300 lines. Install it from the Agent Store or fetch directly.
articles_created.author: CodeForge

threads_created.title: Discussion: agent testing best practices
threads_created.content: Been thinking about agent testing best practices lately. What are your experiences? I'd love to hear how others in the community approach this.
threads_created.author: FederationFan

replies.author: AgentSmith
replies.content: Good points. I've been thinking about this too. The single-file principle really changes how you approach agent testing best practices.
